etreum.problem: An independent horror film festival needed a logo that captured the essence of horror with a cartoonish twist.
etreum.process: Drawing from the morphologies of creatures created for the event, the logo plays with straight and curved shapes in a cartoonish yet structured style.
etreum.solution: A logo that combines horror elements with an accessible style, used across the entire visual identity of the festival.

inspectre.problem: A custom fan brand needed an identity that reflected its urban and youthful style.
inspectre.process: Built with a wavy typeface that matches the brand's style, incorporating the fan icon as an isotype.
inspectre.solution: Complete branding including logo, packaging, and social media material with neon and vibrant aesthetics.

segurola-y-habana.problem: An amateur football team needed a crest that honored tradition with a modern design.
segurola-y-habana.process: Using the national coat of arms as an emblem and adding Maradona's iconic number 10, both the logo and name reference the idol of all.
segurola-y-habana.solution: Complete crest with sportswear design including the official jersey.

kaffeehaus.problem: A coffee shop needed an isotype that conveyed warmth and tradition.
kaffeehaus.process: The logo has a Bauhaus style, taking Marianne Brandt's 1924 teapot as a reference.
kaffeehaus.solution: A minimalist isotype with clean lines that evokes coffee culture.

gm-muebles.problem: A furniture manufacturing and restoration business needed a professional logo.
gm-muebles.process: The logo takes the geometric shapes and straight cuts typical of the industry to form the initials GM.
gm-muebles.solution: A geometric logo that communicates solidity and craftsmanship.

nacional-futbol.problem: An amateur football team needed a crest redesign that preserved the original essence.
nacional-futbol.process: Inspired by traditional old football crests, this redesign maintains the original essence while modernizing the badge.
nacional-futbol.solution: A modernized crest with a central N typography on a navy blue and gold background.

mega-viajeros.problem: An adventure tourism venture needed a dynamic visual identity.
mega-viajeros.process: The logo takes geometric shapes and forms that evoke movement and adventure, forming the initials MV.
mega-viajeros.solution: A dynamic logo with vibrant colors that conveys energy and adventure.

la-2-rusa.problem: A motorcycle apparel importer needed a logo with an American identity.
la-2-rusa.process: While the logo uses the initials with a dynamic and modern typeface, the American flag was added since the client established in the US.
la-2-rusa.solution: An L2R logo integrated with the American flag, communicating the brand's origin and attitude.

etreum-festival.problem: A fantasy, horror, and animation film festival needed graphic pieces for its IV international edition.
etreum-festival.process: Characters were created as nightmare creatures as a visual concept. The idea was to give the event a distinct personality with horror aesthetics but with cartoonish undertones.
etreum-festival.solution: A complete graphic system with characters, posters, stickers, and promotional material for venues in Buenos Aires, Toronto, Madrid, Bogota, Veracruz, and Mexico City.

bauhaus-infografia.problem: Create an educational infographic about the history of the Bauhaus.
bauhaus-infografia.process: Research on the Bauhaus school (1919-1933) and design with aesthetics inspired by the movement.
bauhaus-infografia.solution: A timeline infographic with Bauhaus typography and geometry, combining period photography with graphic elements.

social-media-inspectre.problem: The brand needed visual content for social media that maintained consistency with its urban identity.
social-media-inspectre.process: Design of Instagram pieces including posts, stories, and showroom promotional material.
social-media-inspectre.solution: A social media content suite with neon and street style aesthetics, including product photos and informational pieces.

identity.name: Visual Identity
identity.desc: Logo design, color palettes, and complete visual systems for your brand.

branding.name: Branding
branding.desc: Comprehensive brand identity building with consistency across all touchpoints.

editorial.name: Editorial Design
editorial.desc: Layout of magazines, catalogs, infographics, and printed pieces.

social.name: Social Media
social.desc: Visual content for social media that connects with your audience.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: Hi! I'm Pedro. Digital Artistic Graphic Designer. Creativity, versatility, and passion for design. I graduated in Digital Artistic Graphic Design from Colegio Da Vinci, complementing my education with Web Design and UX Design courses at Coderhouse. My experience across various industries has allowed me to develop a comprehensive and adaptive perspective, combining aesthetics, functionality, and effective communication in every project.
